findings.title: Reentrancy in AbstractYieldStrategy.collectFees
findings.description: The collectFees function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol is not protected by the nonReentrant modifier. It calls _transferYieldTokenToOwner which transfers yield tokens to the fee receiver. If the fee receiver is a contract, it could reenter collectFees or other functions before the state is updated, potentially draining funds or manipulating accrued fees.
findings.recommendation: Add the nonReentrant modifier to the collectFees function to prevent reentrancy attacks.

findings.title: Reentrancy in AbstractWithdrawRequestManager.stakeTokens
findings.description: The stakeTokens function in AbstractWithdrawRequestManager.sol transfers yield tokens to the msg.sender after staking. If the msg.sender is a contract, it could reenter stakeTokens or other functions before the state is updated, potentially allowing double staking or manipulation of yield token balances.
findings.recommendation: Add the nonReentrant modifier to the stakeTokens function or ensure that the transfer happens after all state updates are complete.

findings.title: Reentrancy in RewardManagerMixin.fallback
findings.description: The fallback function in RewardManagerMixin.sol delegates calls to the REWARD_MANAGER contract. If the REWARD_MANAGER contract calls back into the vault, it could bypass nonReentrant checks on public functions, potentially allowing reentrancy attacks.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that the fallback function does not allow reentrancy by checking the context or using a reentrancy guard.

findings.title: Integer Overflow in AbstractYieldStrategy.effectiveSupply
findings.description: The effectiveSupply function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol subtracts s_escrowedShares from totalSupply. If s_escrowedShares is greater than totalSupply, an underflow will occur, leading to incorrect supply calculations and potential fund loss.
findings.recommendation: Add a check to ensure that s_escrowedShares is less than or equal to totalSupply before subtraction.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy.convertYieldTokenToAsset
findings.description: The convertYieldTokenToAsset function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol casts an int256 rate to uint256. If the rate is negative, an underflow will occur, leading to incorrect price calculations and potential fund loss.
findings.recommendation: Add a check to ensure that the rate is non-negative before casting to uint256.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy._accrueFees
findings.description: The _accrueFees function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol sets s_lastFeeAccrualTime to uint32(block.timestamp). If the block timestamp exceeds the maximum value of uint32, an overflow will occur, leading to incorrect fee calculations.
findings.recommendation: Use a larger data type for s_lastFeeAccrualTime or add a check to ensure that block.timestamp does not exceed the maximum value of uint32.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy._calculateAdditionalFeesInYieldToken
findings.description: The _calculateAdditionalFeesInYieldToken function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol uses a Taylor approximation to calculate e^x. If x is large, the approximation may be inaccurate, leading to incorrect fee calculations.
findings.recommendation: Use a more accurate method to calculate e^x or add a check to ensure that x is within a reasonable range.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy._update
findings.description: The _update function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol deletes t_AllowTransfer_To and t_AllowTransfer_Amount after a transfer. If the transfer fails, the transient variables will still be deleted, potentially preventing future transfers.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that the transient variables are only deleted after a successful transfer.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy.mintShares
findings.description: The mintShares function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol sets t_AllowTransfer_To and t_AllowTransfer_Amount before transferring shares. If the transfer fails, the transient variables will still be set, potentially allowing unauthorized transfers.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that the transient variables are only set after a successful transfer.

findings.title: Logic Error in AbstractYieldStrategy.burnShares
findings.description: The burnShares function in AbstractYieldStrategy.sol transfers assets to the lending router after burning shares. If the transfer fails, the shares will still be burned, potentially leading to fund loss.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that the transfer happens before burning shares or add a check to ensure that the transfer is successful.
